title: Casey at the Bat
writer: Hector Turnbull, Monte Brice, Reggie Morris
actors: Wallace Beery, Zasu Pitts, Ford Sterling
plot: Casey is a slovenly junk man in a turn of the twentieth century hick town who has a remarkable ability to play baseball. An unscrupulous New York scout signs him up, so Casey and his equally dishonest manager go to the big leagues...
